mapper.sql: select r.registration_id, r.activity_id, r.user_id, r.status, r.reject_reason, r.checked_in, r.checked_in_at, r.review_by, r.review_time, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, a.title as activity_title, u.nick_name as user_nick_name, u.real_name as user_real_name from mc_activity_registration r left join mc_activity a on r.activity_id = a.activity_id left join mc_user u on r.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: where r.user_id = #{userId} order by r.create_time desc
